---
title: "test"
format: revealjs
---




## Slide title

:::::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="33%"}

```{r}
#| fig-width: 4
#| fig-height: 2.2
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)

ggplot()

```


:::

::: {.column width="66%"}

```{r}
#| fig-width: 8
#| fig-height: 2.2
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)


p1 <- ggplot()
p2 <- ggplot()
p1 + p2

```


- blud
- lkjfd
- lkjef

:::

::::::
